Identify, analyse and re-engineer business processes of an entity in order to bring it up to today’s Global and Digital standards.
Investigate and apply knowledge of information systems in achieving operational excellence for the digital firm.
Discuss and recommend some of the latest trends in IT Infrastructure (Cloud, Virtualization, Mobile, Digital, Green Computing etc..) that could support an Enterprise System.
Analyse the threats and vulnerabilities against a firm’s Information System and identify the tools and technologies for securing it.
Critically analyse how Information systems are transforming businesses and why they are essential for managing them.
Develop an understanding on how to derive knowledge using Business Intelligence and use this knowledge to identify and analyse its benefits on decision making.
Develop workplace soft skills that include working in groups, writing formal reports and delivering oral presentations
